reviewIssues.label: Docs overclaim completeness vs behaviour tests
reviewIssues.reason: Baseline + owner-unit table in this fixture prevents silent drift of 'complete' claims away from review-issue resolution.

reviewIssues.label: Adaptive selection lacks recent-repeat penalty and question-type weakness weighting
reviewIssues.reason: Template selection is extracted into buildGrammarPracticeQueue pure function with explicit weights for due, weak, recent-miss, question-type weakness, template/concept freshness, and focus matching. buildGrammarMiniPack adds quota-aware mini-test balancing.

reviewIssues.label: Support scoring may be session-level; Smart + allowTeachingItems downgrades independent correctness
reviewIssues.reason: Rename to firstAttemptIndependent / supportUsed / supportLevelAtScoring with three-layer migration (state reload, event dual-write, in-flight session version stamping). Session-level promotion removed for Smart + allowTeachingItems under supportContractVersion 2.

reviewIssues.label: Legacy content gaps (thin explain/vocabulary/formality pools, narrow concept pools)
reviewIssues.deferral: Separate reviewed content-release plan after the perfection-pass engine is stable. This plan pins the current per-question-type and per-concept floors so content erosion is detectable.

reviewIssues.label: Transfer writing placeholder-only; no live non-scored writing lane
reviewIssues.reason: Non-scored transfer writing lane with paragraph prompts, grammar-target checklist, per-promptId evidence storage (5 slots per prompt, 20 prompts max), and adult-review copy. Does not touch mastery, retry, reward projection, or Concordium progress. Aligned with docs/grammar-transfer-decision.md.

reviewIssues.label: Strict mini-test needs behaviour-level QA (navigation, timer expiry, unanswered handling)
reviewIssues.reason: SSR harness in tests/react-grammar-surface.test.js is extended to cover answer preservation across navigation, timer expiry, unanswered handling, end-review gating, and repair/AI command fail-closed during active mini-test. Playwright is intentionally not added; SSR matches repo convention.

reviewIssues.label: Mode focus behaviour unclear for trouble/surgery/builder
reviewIssues.note: Review agent did not run tests; existing NO_STORED_FOCUS_MODES / NO_SESSION_FOCUS_MODES already encode the intended table, and grammar-engine.test.js covers trouble/surgery/builder focus handling. No reimplementation needed.

reviewIssues.label: Analytics show strength without confidence or sample-size context
reviewIssues.reason: Read model exposes a derived confidence field with label taxonomy (emerging, building, consolidating, secure, needs-repair), sample size, interval days, and distinct templates. Scene renders the label alongside the number.

reviewIssues.label: Accepted-answer handling relies on inline arrays, not a declarative registry
reviewIssues.reason: Every constructed-response template carries a declarative answerSpec (kind: exact / normalisedText / acceptedSet / punctuationPattern / multiField / manualReviewOnly) with golden and near-miss examples. markByAnswerSpec replaces direct markStringAnswer call sites. contentReleaseId bump policy codified; any bump pairs with tests/fixtures/grammar-legacy-oracle/release-notes.md entry.

perfectionPassReleaseGate.description: Perfection-pass release gate: extends production smoke, refreshes bundle audit, flips baseline rows to completed, and updates mastery-region live checklist.

contentFloor.note: Per-question-type floor pins the current denominator so content expansion plans can only grow, not erode, the distribution.
